creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
HAVE successfully compiled THE-3.1 + PDCurses-3.2 on Solaris-10 Sparc.
It runs OK but crashes when setting certain color schemes, but that is
not that big of an issue right now.

Have NOT yet been successful in compiling THE-3.2 on Solaris-10 Sparc.

Have NOT yet been successful with Solaris-10 X86 any version *(THE or
PDCurses) nor yet with FBSD and any version PDCurses > 3.1.

Unfortunately, the development of PDCurses relies on hard-coded
include/library paths in its Configure script (!*!&@&#) and ignores the
usual compiler environment variables (sigh!). It also conflicts with
some native X11 definitions.

I will continue to work on this as time permits.
